{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Akura building
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Akura building]] is located in [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
